visa_type_detail.duration: One year (365 days) from the date of grant of ETA.
visa_type_detail.stay_limit: Continuous stay during each visit shall not exceed 180 days. If the intention is to stay for more then 180 days, shall get registered with FRRO/FRO concerned within two weeks after the expiry of 180 days.
